sections.paragraph: m. separation i.q. בַּד No. I. Hence in Acc. adv. separately, Lev 13:46 solitarily, alone (commonly expressed in Latin by the adjective solus), Isa 27:10 עִיר בְּצוּרָה בָּדָד “the fortified city standeth alone,” i.e. is left forsaken. Deu 32:12, יְהֹוָה בָּדָד יַנְחֶנּוּ “Jehovah alone did lead him.” Also לְבָדָד solitarily, for alone.
